changes.reason: VALID_1DTE_ONLY contributes material PnL but has heavy average MAE; current slope floor is permissive at 0.01, while the sample median ES-VWAP slope is materially stronger. A modest 0.04 floor tests whether 1DTE fallback needs real ES trend confirmation without disabling the profile.
The 1DTE fallback worst-MAE bucket is tail-heavy; raising structure from 3 to 4 is a local quality test for the 1DTE route only, avoiding any VALID_0DTE pullback/charm-pin throughput damage.
Caps 1DTE breakout upside targeting at a moderate grid value to reduce long heat/exposure from fallback trades while preserving the profile's 20-trade positive contribution.

expected_effect: Should improve 1DTE average/worst MAE and exposure efficiency while preserving the proven 1DTE fallback edge. Main tradeoff is losing some profitable low-structure or weak-slope 1DTE winners; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001 or 1DTE PnL retention is under 95%.
label: 1dte-local-quality-gate
rationale: This implements one legal Batch G fallback-profile experiment focused only on breakout_long_1dte. Removing 1DTE entirely would sacrifice about $1305 and still not fix the -527 global tail, so this tests a narrower local quality gate: require stronger ES trend/structure and cap 1DTE target distance. It avoids repeating failed no-0DTE fallback tightening and does not touch global vetoes or option-dependent VALID_0DTE profiles.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: breakout_long_1dte produced 20 VALID_1DTE_ONLY trades and $1305 PnL, but average MAE was -123.86 and worst MAE was -375.7. It is too profitable to remove, but it is a valid local risk-adjusted optimization target.
strategy_hypotheses.name: 1DTE Breakout Quality Gate
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample with all winners; stricter slope/structure may remove profitable fallback insurance without enough MAE improvement.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE unavailable while 1DTE map is valid and breakout_long_1dte is routed.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: 1DTE average MAE and worst MAE improve, 1DTE PnL remains at least 95% of current, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001, and VALID_0DTE performance is unchanged.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: This is a strong long-only momentum/pullback regime with unusually clean realized outcomes: 107 completed trades, 100% realized win rate, $7125.8 net PnL, 0.4% drawdown, no slow...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Pin Heat Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -375 while retaining >=90% of charm-pin PnL and no loss of fast winner count.

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains >= current $1305 while average MAE and worst MAE improve versus breakout_long_1dte alone.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Risk Split
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated dormant profile must be independently positive, reduce combined charm/pin worst MAE, and avoid degrading active profile PnL.
